title: Start at Home
description: Gather your group and get ready for your fairy tale adventure! Walk to the next waypoint.

title: Kindness Riddle
description: What is the greatest commandment? Type your answer below.

title: Deliver Cookies
description: Bring cookies to a neighbor or family member and upload a photo of your group delivering them.

title: Choose Your Path
description: You have two fairy-tale options: eat the cookies or give them away.

title: Cookie Feast
description: Enjoy your cookies together! Next, head to the final waypoint.

title: Spread Joy
description: Give the cookies away and share a kind word with someone. Next, head to the final waypoint.
